Planets.and Occupations
If planets exert their influence on other departments of life, they
do so on the means of livelihood also. This is a natural inference. Bvt in
delineatln.g the effects of planets on the source and method of eamilg,
we should not forget the bask principle of astrok>gy that all pred1ctlons
should be made against the background of the country, the tnes and
hereditary and personal environment of the native.
